source_note: Admission note: De-identified adult patient presented with fatigue. Problem list includes source-recorded type 2 diabetes mellitus. Medication list includes metformin 500 mg twice daily. Creatinine was 1.2 mg/dL on the encounter date.
reference_summary: De-identified patient has source-recorded type 2 diabetes mellitus, metformin use, and creatinine 1.2 mg/dL documented for the encounter.

source_note: Discharge summary: De-identified adult patient hospitalized for documented shortness of breath. Brief Hospital Course: Symptoms improved with documented inpatient monitoring. Allergy information was not found in the provided note.
